organized_notes.text: long UNH @ 426.31, 1 share - very steady price action, nice PBO [TRADE: long UNH @ 426.31 x1]
on UNH just watch prior high where it rejected today
TWLO nice wimpy pullback - nice long if market rallies into the gap
feeling the urge to oversize - that greed will hurt me if i give in to it #flag
PANW FTNT TWLO all nice longs #watch
watching NU closely for a D1 breakout - nice high volume rally on the open
long NU @ 13.53, 30 shares - M5 bull flag with brief M5 compression - stop right below VWAP [TRADE: long NU @ 13.53 x30]

long TSLA @ 427.24, 1 share - nice strength yesterday and breakout above PDH and HOD on volume - potential H- above but ill watch what happens at that level before exiting [TRADE: long TSLA @ 427.24 x1]

exit NU long @ 13.67, missed out some profits for getting greedy and hoping for more strength and ended up exiting for a pullback - exiting as this rally is really steep and reached measured move - this second leg also does not have high volume candles [TRADE: exit NU @ 13.67 x0]
long PANW @ 353.54, 1 share - nice break to new HOD with retest, SPY very nice and tight price action - if we do get a red candle i'm expecting it to instantly reverse [TRADE: long PANW @ 353.54 x1]
add PANW long @ 354.51, 1 share nice RS as SPY is testing the bid
exit TSLA long @ 429.13, exit into strength at CH+ ceiling - TSLA is really choppy with sharp pullbacks [TRADE: exit TSLA @ 429.13 x0]
TSLA transitioned out of a range and broke out - what were the signs of it gaining strength? orderly candles? look on the M1? #qn
partial exit PANW long @ 356.21, 1 sahrere, holding the other half in case of continuation - market is really strong today [TRADE: exit PANW @ 356.21 x0]
my comment earlier on SPY having nice tight PA and  likely to be instantly erased was nicely identified - this is a HPTE bullish trend day and THIS is when i size up #flag #impt
exit PANW long @ 357.97, 1 share [TRADE: exit PANW @ 357.97 x0]
very nice trade on PANW and nice exit into strength #flag
